title: Puccini
writer: Leonardo Benvenuti, Carmine Gallone, Glauco Pellegrini
actors: Gabriele Ferzetti, Märta Torén, Nadia Gray
plot: This biographical story of Puccini (Gabriele Ferzetti) spans his creative life from early student days to the height of success, including his early flop Madame Butterfly and his incomplete Turandot. Along the way he encounters th...
